description_long: This figure depicts a highly abstracted and distorted adult pedestrian, with elongated, angular limbs and a twisted, contorted body posture. The head is starkly white with exaggerated facial features, creating a ghostly, unsettling appearance. The limbs and torso are rendered in jagged, black geometric forms, giving the impression of torn or fragmented material. Several sharp, ribbon-like extensions protrude from the upper body, adding to the chaotic and surreal visual effect. The feet are uneven and appear to be fused with the ground, while the arms are bent at unnatural angles. The overall form is humanoid but heavily stylized, evoking a sense of movement and tension.
description: A surreal, distorted adult pedestrian with a ghostly white face and jagged, black angular limbs, featuring sharp, ribbon-like extensions and a contorted posture.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the white, expressive face and the chaotic arrangement of black, angular limbs and protrusions.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the elongated, twisted limbs and the sharp, ribbon-like extensions projecting from the upper body.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the contorted figure, with the angular limbs and extensions forming a complex, spiky silhouette.
description_view_3: This side view reveals the figure's bent posture and the uneven, fused feet, with the head partially visible from the side.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract, form-fitting bodysuit with exaggerated, angular extensions
attribute_posture: twisted, contorted stance with limbs bent at sharp angles
